assumption: Agents are grouped into early access mainstream and high barrier segments
risk_if_wrong: Real segmentation may differ from the synthetic groups
review_action: Use survey administrative or qualitative evidence for segmentation

risk_if_wrong: Trial partial use abandonment and churn are ignored
Real adopters may abandon switch or reduce use

assumption: Peer influence travels through synthetic network ties
risk_if_wrong: Real influence may come through media institutions geography or supply chains
review_action: Use empirical or stakeholder-reviewed network structure

assumption: Agents adopt when adoption pressure clears a threshold
risk_if_wrong: Real decisions may be probabilistic deliberative or institutionally constrained
review_action: Compare deterministic probabilistic and utility-based rules

assumption: Seed strategy can be random high-degree or bridge-and-equity focused
risk_if_wrong: Actual seeding may depend on legitimacy access and implementation constraints
review_action: Test multiple seeding strategies and stakeholder acceptability

risk_if_wrong: Trust is contextual historical and relational
review_action: Use participatory review and group-specific assumptions
